name: Broccoli & Blue Cheese in Prepared Puff
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C) for 10 minutes.
2. Beat the eggs until light in a bowl. Mix in both cheeses, pepper, and nutmeg until combined.
3. Stir in the cooked broccoli. Set aside.
4. Roll out the pastry large enough to fit into a 9-inch deep dish quiche pan.
5. Pour the filling into the crust. Bake for 30 minutes.
